description: Phase B.4 — second-wave benign templates focused on hard negatives that mimic scam tonality (urgency, OTP mentions, fraud advisories, regulator names) so the FPR CI can be tightened. Adds ~75 templates across RBI advisories, real bank fraud alerts, Mumbai/Delhi Police challans, UIDAI / Aadhaar updates, IT department e-filing, IRCTC + IndiGo travel, Tata Power / BSES utilities, India Post / Bluedart / Delhivery, and high-pressure-but-legitimate banking flows. Designed to *fail* a naive 'urgent + bank + OTP' rule (which is exactly what the v1 reward-hacked analyzer learned).
source: Hand-authored from public Indian SMS corpora — sample messages on the npci.org.in safety bulletins, RBI sachet alerts, sample Mumbai Police e-challan CSV (publicly archived), UIDAI reverification reminder texts, and individual user-submitted screenshots indexed on getsby.in. No real personal data. Designed for: (a) ratio rebalancing toward benign and (b) FPR CI tightening per docs/POSTMORTEM_FUTURE.md v3 milestone #2.
split_intent: training (do NOT add to test bench — bench is frozen at v0.2)

templates.text: RBI Sachet Advisory: Beware of fake KYC update messages. RBI / your bank will NEVER ask for OTP, CVV, PIN. Report fraud to 1930. Forward suspicious SMS to 7726. www.rbi.org.in
templates.why_hard: mentions 'OTP', 'fraud', 'KYC' — scam-like vocabulary but is the real warning

templates.text: Sachet RBI: Scams reported in your district. NEVER share OTP. Verify any 'bank official' caller by hanging up and calling the number on your card. Report at cybercrime.gov.in.
templates.why_hard: explicit 'OTP' + 'scam' + 'bank official' — only the framing is protective

templates.text: RBI Caution: Investment offers promising 'guaranteed returns' from unregistered schemes are illegal. Verify any scheme on rbi.org.in/sachet. Do not share Aadhaar or PAN with strangers.
templates.why_hard: mentions 'investment', 'returns', 'Aadhaar' — scam-like content in a legitimate advisory

templates.text: HDFC: Rs 7,540.00 debited from A/c XX2231 to BIGBASKET via UPI on 18-Apr-26 09:12. Ref 612478291301. Avl Bal: Rs 18,432.10. SMS BLOCK to 7308080808 if not done by you.
SBI: A/c XX9087 dr by 1200 (UPI/612001/PAYTM/612001@paytm) on 19APR. Bal 78,401.50. Call 1800111109 if not done. -SBI
ICICI Bank: Rs 250,000 transfer to MILLINIUM-FORGE-LLP @ ybl was approved on 14-04-26. Ref I3401-984321. Available bal Rs 1,12,432. To dispute call 1860 120 6699.
AXIS BANK: Your credit card statement is generated. Total due Rs 18,432.50, min due Rs 1,200. Pay by 28-Apr-26 to avoid interest. www.axisbank.com/statement
KOTAK: Standing instruction of Rs 12,500 (HOMELOAN-EMI) executed on 01-Apr-26 from A/c XX5612. Bal Rs 28,431.20. -Kotak Mahindra
PNB: Cheque no 419201 of Rs 50,000 in favour of TATA-AIG INSURANCE has been cleared from your A/c on 17-Apr-26. -PNB
YES BANK: Rs 80,000 deposited via NEFT from your CA-XX1102 to your SB-XX9087 on 22-Apr-26. Ref N4-9012. Bal: Rs 1,40,231. -YES
BOI: Loan EMI for HOUSING-LOAN account ending XX7720 will be auto-debited Rs 27,431 on 05-May-26. Ensure sufficient balance. -Bank of India
HDFC Alert: Suspicious login attempt to Net Banking from MUMBAI device on 19-Apr-26 14:32. If this was you ignore. If NOT, call 1800 202 6161 IMMEDIATELY and reset password. DO NOT share OTP.
templates.why_hard: urgency + 'IMMEDIATELY' + bank name + OTP mention — but is the actual fraud-alert from the bank

templates.text: SBI Alert: Card XX8821 was used for Rs 25,000 at AMAZON-INDIA on 22-Apr-26. If unauthorised, BLOCK CARD now via SBI YONO or call 1800 425 3800. -SBI
templates.why_hard: urgency + large amount + 'block now' instruction — looks like a phishing setup but is real bank alert

templates.text: ICICI: Did you initiate UPI transfer of Rs 49,500 to RAVISHANKAR@ybl from MOBILE BANKING on 16-Apr-26? Reply Y/N to 5676766 within 10 minutes or call 18601206699.
templates.why_hard: deadline pressure + reply-or-call urgency — exactly mimics common scam pattern but is real ICICI flow

templates.text: AXIS BANK FRAUD ALERT: Rs 1,80,000 was attempted on your card XX2401 at PARIS, FR on 23-Apr-26. Transaction was DECLINED. If you didn't attempt, call 1860 419 5555. -Axis
templates.why_hard: international, large amount, 'DECLINED' — high-tension wording but legitimate notice

templates.text: KOTAK: Two failed login attempts on Net Banking detected on 11-Apr-26 from a NEW DEVICE in BENGALURU. If this was not you, call 1860 266 2666 immediately to secure your account.
templates.why_hard: new device + immediate-action callout — matches scammer template

templates.text: Your OTP for HDFC NetBanking is 491203. Valid for 5 minutes. DO NOT share with anyone, including bank staff. -HDFC
templates.why_hard: legit OTP delivery — the model must NOT flag based on 'OTP' alone

templates.text: OTP 730155 for AMAZON-IN order #408-2391301. Do not share. Code expires in 8 minutes.
templates.why_hard: OTP delivery for e-commerce — naive rules flag any 'OTP'

templates.text: PhonePe: 4-digit code 8217 for adding bank A/c. Do not share with anyone. PhonePe will never ask for this. -PhonePe
templates.why_hard: OTP from UPI app + 'never ask' framing

templates.text: GPAY: 6-digit code 401-203 to confirm your phone number. Do not share. Valid 10 min.
templates.why_hard: Google Pay OTP delivery

templates.text: Your IRCTC verification code is 998012. NEVER share OTP with anyone. Code valid for 10 min. -IRCTC
templates.why_hard: rail booking OTP — legit but uses 'NEVER share' framing

templates.text: Mumbai Traffic Police E-Challan: Vehicle MH-04-AT-2391 cited for OVER SPEEDING on 14-Apr-26 at WESTERN EXPRESSWAY 28kmph over limit. Pay Rs 1,000 at https://mumbaitrafficpolice.com/echallan
templates.why_hard: official government communication with payment-due element — scam-adjacent

templates.text: Delhi Traffic Police: Challan no 191028301 for Vehicle DL-9C-4710 (RED LIGHT JUMP, FATEHPURI) Rs 5,000. Due 30 days. Pay at echallan.parivahan.gov.in. -DTP
templates.why_hard: specific challan number + parivahan.gov.in = real, but format mimics scams

templates.text: Bangalore Traffic Police: e-challan #BTP/2026/12431 for vehicle KA-03-AB-9012 (NO HELMET, MG ROAD, 18-Apr-26). Pay Rs 1,000 within 30 days. www.bangaloretrafficpolice.gov.in
templates.why_hard: police + payment + URL — looks scammy but legit

templates.text: Hyderabad TP: Challan No HTP-9012-26 - Vehicle TS-09-EM-1820 - DRUNK DRIVE on 12-Apr-26. Court appearance required. Date: 03-May-26. -HTP
templates.why_hard: court appearance + serious offense — high-pressure but real

templates.text: UIDAI: Your Aadhaar 8901-XXXX-2418 will EXPIRE for biometric reverification on 30-May-26. Visit nearest CSC or aadhaar.uidai.gov.in to update. NEVER share Aadhaar OTP.
templates.why_hard: Aadhaar + 'expire' + 'OTP' — exact pattern that scammers mimic

templates.text: UIDAI: Aadhaar update request received for 8901-XXXX-2418. Mobile no change pending. URN: 0000/00012/15431. Status at uidai.gov.in/check-status. -UIDAI
templates.why_hard: URN + 'pending' + url — but real UIDAI flow

templates.text: UIDAI Caution: We are seeing increased scam calls claiming Aadhaar will be DEACTIVATED. UIDAI does NOT call you. NEVER share OTP, biometric, or Aadhaar number. Report to 1947.
templates.why_hard: describes a scam in detail — naive rules flag this very advisory

templates.text: Income Tax India: e-Filing reminder. ITR for AY 2026-27 due by 31-Jul-2026. File at www.incometax.gov.in. PAN ABCDE1234F.
Income Tax India: Refund of Rs 18,422 for AY 2025-26 has been processed and credited to your A/c XX2231 on 21-Apr-26. -ITD
templates.why_hard: refund + amount + bank account — typical scam pattern but is the legit ITD flow

templates.text: Income Tax: Notice u/s 143(1) sent for AY 2025-26 to your registered email. Login to e-Filing portal to view. -CPC
templates.why_hard: official 'notice' + section reference — looks intimidating but standard

templates.text: GST: GSTR-3B for Mar-26 (GSTIN 27AAACC0000B1Z5) was filed successfully on 20-Apr-26. ARN AA21042646000341. -GSTN
GSTN: Reminder - GSTR-1 for Apr-26 due by 11-May-26. Late filing attracts Rs 50/day per Act. www.gst.gov.in -GSTN
IRCTC: Booking confirmed - PNR 6452109840, MUM-DEL, 12-May-26 22:30, Train 12952 Rajdhani, Class 2A. Web check-in opens 4 hr before departure.
IRCTC: PNR 8412904 - 12952/RAJDHANI EXP - SCHEDULE CHANGE. New departure 23:15 (was 22:30) on 12-May-26. Apologies for inconvenience.
IndiGo: 6E-2104 BLR-DEL on 23-Apr-26 confirmed. PNR Q1A2B3. Departure 06:50, Arrival 09:35. Web check-in opens 48hr before.
IndiGo: Flight 6E-198 from MUM scheduled for 21:00 on 21-Apr-26 has been DELAYED to 22:30 due to ATC. We apologise. -IndiGo
Air India: AI-101 BOM-LHR 24-Apr-26 14:00 confirmed. PNR XYZ123. Boarding from Gate 41, Terminal 2 BOM. -AIE
Amazon.in: Order #408-2391301 (Boat Stone 1200 speaker) shipped via DELHIVERY (AWB 22931840). Delivery 24-Apr-26.
Amazon: Order #408-9123710 - OUT FOR DELIVERY today. Track at amazon.in/orders. -Amazon India
Flipkart: Order OD41001239840 has been DELIVERED at 13:20. If not received, contact us within 24h. flipkart.com/track
BlueDart: Shipment 41201938 from APPLE INDIA arriving today between 11:00-14:00. Ensure recipient available. -BlueDart
India Post: Speed Post EI239103940IN dispatched from MUMBAI-PO on 18-Apr-26. Expected delivery 22-Apr-26. Track at indiapost.gov.in. -DOP
Delhivery: AWB 941283019403 was attempted but RECIPIENT NOT AVAILABLE. We will reattempt tomorrow. Update at delhivery.com.
templates.why_hard: 'attempted but not delivered' is a common scam framing

templates.text: Dunzo: Order #DZ4123908 - your groceries from BIG BAZAAR will arrive in 12 minutes. Delivery partner Ramesh M. -Dunzo
TATA Power Mumbai: Bill of Rs 4,231 for A/c 41000098 (Apr-26) is generated. Due 28-Apr-26. Pay at tatapower.com or via your UPI app. -Tata
TATA Power Reminder: Bill Rs 4,231 due tomorrow 28-Apr-26 for A/c 41000098. Avoid disconnection - pay now via your UPI app or tatapower.com.
templates.why_hard: 'avoid disconnection' + 'pay now' urgency — utility scam mimics this exactly

templates.text: BSES Rajdhani: Electricity bill Rs 6,890 for K Number 121300012 (Apr-26) generated. Due date 30-Apr-26. www.bsesdelhi.com
Reliance Energy: Power outage scheduled in YOUR area on 25-Apr-26 from 10:00 to 14:00 for maintenance. -RInfra
BWSSB: Water bill Rs 412 for K No 12X20104 (Mar-26) due 22-Apr-26. Online: bbmpgov.in. -BWSSB Bangalore
Indane: Refill booking 9012390401 for LPG cylinder confirmed. Delivery in 2-3 days. Cost Rs 1,090. -IOC
HP Gas: Delivery completed on 16-Apr-26 at 11:40. Receipt no 4012039. Next refill window opens 16-Jun-26. -HPCL
LIC: Premium of Rs 18,432 for Policy 891239048 will auto-debit from A/c XX2231 on 25-Apr-26. -LIC India
LIC: Policy 891239048 - PREMIUM OVERDUE. Last date 30-Apr-26 to avoid lapse. Pay at licindia.in. -LIC
templates.why_hard: overdue + lapse threat — insurance scams mimic

templates.text: HDFC ERGO: Vehicle Insurance for MH-04-AT-2391 expires on 15-May-26. Renew online at hdfcergo.com to avoid coverage gap.
Apollo Hospitals: Appointment with Dr A Iyer confirmed on 23-Apr-26 at 11:00. Apollo Bandra. Bring previous reports. -Apollo
Practo: Reminder - Dr R Sharma video consultation today at 16:30. Join via practo.com/consult. -Practo
Pharmeasy: Order PE-91202410 - your prescription medicines will be delivered today between 18:00-21:00. -PharmEasy
DPS RK Puram: Half-yearly report card for Roll 4012 (Class IX-B) is available on the parent portal. Login with registered mobile. -DPS
BYJU'S: Live class with Aman sir on 'Trigonometry - Heights & Distances' starts in 30 min. Join from app. -BYJU'S
Hotstar: Your Disney+ Hotstar Mobile (1 yr) is renewing on 02-May-26 for Rs 499. Manage at hotstar.com/billing.
Netflix: Your auto-renewal of Rs 199 for Mobile plan failed. Update payment by 25-Apr-26 to avoid pause. netflix.com/payment
templates.why_hard: subscription failure + 'update payment' urgency = mimics phishing

templates.text: Spotify: Premium (Family) plan renewed Rs 199 on 19-Apr-26. Reference SPF-410123. -Spotify
Election Commission: General Elections 2026 - your name appears on the voter list, polling booth #41 at NMH School, Andheri W. Polling on 28-Apr-26. -ECI
MyGov India: Updated COVID-19 vaccination certificate for ABHA HEALTH ID 14-9101-9012-3010 is now available on cowin.gov.in.
templates.why_hard: ABHA + Cowin reference = format used in real fraud reverification scams

templates.text: EPFO: Your monthly PF contribution of Rs 4,800 for Mar-26 has been credited to UAN 100119302. Bal Rs 2,40,832. -EPFO
Naukri.com: 12 new jobs matching 'Software Engineer Bangalore' in last 24h. Login to view. -Naukri
LinkedIn: Anika Gupta from STRIPE wants to connect with you. Open LinkedIn to respond.
Zerodha: Your CONSOLIDATED ACCOUNT STATEMENT for Mar-26 is now available at console.zerodha.com. -Zerodha
templates.why_hard: investment-platform + 'statement' — investment scams mimic format

templates.text: Groww: SIP for ICICI PRU LIQUID FUND Rs 5,000 was processed on 21-Apr-26. Units allotted 19.41. -Groww
Upstox: Brokerage statement for Mar-26 is now downloadable. Net brokerage Rs 412. -Upstox
Akshaya Patra: Thank you for donation of Rs 1,500 on 18-Apr-26. 80G receipt sent to your registered email. -Akshaya Patra Foundation
Zomato: Your order #ZO9012390 from BIRYANI BLUES will arrive in 32 min. Delivery partner Ravi K. -Zomato
Swiggy: Order DELIVERED. Rate your meal from PIZZA HUT and earn 50 SuperCoins. -Swiggy
Jio: Your Rs 299 plan auto-renewed on 21-Apr-26. Validity till 21-May-26. -Jio
Airtel: Recharge of Rs 549 for 9876543210 successful. 1.5GB/day for 56 days. Bal voice 100 min. -Airtel
Vi: Bill of Rs 449 for Apr-26 generated. Due 27-Apr-26 to avoid line interruption. Pay at myvi.in. -Vi India
templates.why_hard: 'avoid interruption' utility threat tone

templates.text: NPCI Safety Reminder: NEVER share UPI PIN. NPCI / banks NEVER ask for PIN over call/SMS. Report fraud to 1930 or cybercrime.gov.in. -NPCI
templates.why_hard: explicit 'never share UPI PIN' — naive 'urgent + UPI' rules trip on this

templates.text: HDFC Securities: Annual KYC re-verification due. Visit branch with Aadhaar + PAN + photograph by 30-Jun-26. NO ONE will ask for OTP. -HDFCSec
templates.why_hard: KYC + 'visit branch' + 'NEVER OTP' = scam-pattern shape, but legit broker re-KYC

templates.text: ICICI: Periodic KYC update is required for A/c XX2231. Submit fresh PAN+address proof at any branch by 30-Jun-26. We will not call/SMS for this. -ICICI
templates.why_hard: KYC + deadline + bank — exact wording mimicked by scammers

templates.text: Amazon: Refund of Rs 1,299 for order #408-9123710 has been processed to your original payment method. Reflects in 5-7 days. -Amazon
